Home Software Engineering TeamRunning · Team run Switch YouhelloSsolution_designerThinkingHello! How can I help? Youcould you send architecture reviewer for this { "recipient_name": "architecture_reviewer", "message_type": "Same-ticket mobile UX rework design review request", "content": "Please review a same-ticket mobile UX redesign rework for AutoByteus Remote Access.

Context: the implemented PWA now works technically in the user's LAN/Electron build: pairing and /mobile access succeeded. However, user validation showed the post-pairing mobile workspace is not product-usable. Screenshots show the phone UI exposing compressed desktop navigation: desktop left drawer/tree, top tabs Running/Files/Team/Tools, nested Running List/Configuration, right-panel-derived Team/Terminal/Activity tabs, and duplicated Team concepts. The user wants this fixed on the same ticket, not split into a separate future ticket, because the Remote Access MVP is not usable on phone without a clean mobile journey.

New/revised artifacts:
- Mobile UX addendum: /Users/normy/autobyteus_org/autobyteus-worktrees/mobile-remote-access-requirements/tickets/mobile-remote-access-requirements/mobile-ux-redesign-addendum.md
